body.title: Sharpen /review for filing-time use (called by /decided + /fixit)
body.result: Reshaped ~/.claude/skills/review/SKILL.md — filing-time mode (for /decided) + standalone mode (plan/code/PR). Filing checks: duplicate, already-done-in-code, blocked-by-pending, size sanity, scope-creep, test-plan emit, HIGH-inertia inline approval+stamp. Logs to review.log for future T-review-self-learning. 5dfd5c34.
body.description:
Current /review is positioned as 'before sprinting' — reshape it as the filing-time gate called by /decided before a ticket lands in queue.json.

## Filing-time checks (Haiku-minion shaped — known output format)
1. Duplicate vs queue.json (pending + in_progress + recent done)
2. Already-done-in-code — grep for the proposed feature's key symbols/tool names
3. Blocked-by-pending — implicit dep on a still-pending ticket
4. Size sanity — does description's scope match declared size? flag XL; nudge breakdown on L
5. Scope-creep — does this contain >1 ticket's worth of work?
6. Test plan — emit a `test_plan:` field: which new tests, which regression guards, any real-DB integration test
7. HIGH-inertia touchpoints — if touching brainstem/, memory/models.py, cognition/reasoners/base.py, ASK Akien inline for pre-approval, stamp ticket body with 'pre-approved by Akien YYYY-MM-DD for touching <file> — reason: X'

## Standalone invocation
/review can still be called on a risky diff/PR/plan — same checks, different input shape. Detect input type and branch.

## Not in scope
- Self-learning from history — separate ticket.
- Building /decided that calls /review — separate ticket.
